meaning: n.意大利熏火腿(切成薄片,常与甜瓜或无花果配成一道菜)
examples: Add the prosciutto, spinach and dill to the pasta mixture and toss to combine.
Try two great salad appetizers: prosciutto and heart of artichoke salad and mackerel salad.
Arrange half of each of the prosciutto, pepperoni, and salami atop the ricotta mixture.
